scripts.postinstall: concurrently -n "client,server,broker,lambda" "npm run client-install" "npm run server-install" "npm run broker-install" "npm run lambda-install"
scripts.client: node scripts/run-with-modern-node.js npm --prefix client run dev
scripts.server: node scripts/run-with-modern-node.js cross-env WAKEWORD_PIPER_EXEC=./server/.wakeword-venv/bin/piper npm run dev --prefix server
scripts.server-install: node scripts/run-with-modern-node.js npm --prefix server install --include=optional && node scripts/run-with-modern-node.js npm --prefix server run ensure:native
scripts.debug: concurrently -n "client,server" "npm run client" "cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--inspect-brk=9229 npm run server"
scripts.reset: npm run clean:confirm && npm run seed
